product.description: Salmon is an excellent source of vitamin B12, vitamin D and selenium. It is a good source of niacin, omega-3 fatty acids, protein, phosphorus and vitamin B6. The salmon flesh texture are combination of flaky and smooth. It has a mild sweet flavour with strong briny taste. Salmon also taste great even just by baking in oven with olive oil without other seasoning.

metaData.Key Information:
• Packed in the convenient pack where consumer can easily take the portion they want as each piece of salmon slice are packed individually
• Each packet consists of 4 pieces
metaData.Nutritional Data:
Attributes Per Serving
Energy 111kcal
Protein 21g
Total Fat 0.8g
Saturated Fat 0.2g
Monounsaturated Fat 0.1g
Polyunsaturated Fat 0.2g
Trans Fat 0g
Cholesterol 41mg
Carbohydrate 5g
Dietary Fibre 0g
Sodium 667mg
metaData.Preparation:
Cooking instructions:
1. Take out salmon slice from the packet
2. Defrost it
3. Pour some oil into frying pan and heat it up
4. Place salmon slice into pan and fry about 3 to 5 minutes on each side
5. It is ready to be served

product.description: This product may vary from Vietnam / China depending on stock availability

metaData.Key Information:
• Ready to cook shrimp meat

• Firm and springy texture, without the use of seasoning

• Rich shrimp sweetness taste

• Can be cooked in a variety of dishes
metaData.Preparation:
1. In a large bowl, stir together olive oil, lemon juice, parsley, garlic, and black pepper
2. Season with crushed red pepper
3. Add shrimp, and toss to coat
4. Marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes
5. Preheat grill for high heat
6. Lightly oil grill grate
7. Grill for 2 to 3 minutes per side, or until opaque

metaData.Key Information:
• Enjoy premium hake fish fillet in the comfort of home
• Convenient and hassel-free for time strapped working people
• Superb for oven bake
metaData.Preparation:
• Deep Fry:
1. Preheat oil to 180°C
2. Deep fry frozen fish for 5 minutes - 6 minutes or until golden brown
• Oven-Bake:
1. Preheat oven to 220°C
2. Place frozen fish on a baking rack and bake for about 7 minutes
3. Turn the fish and bake for another 7 minutes - 8 minutes

product.description:
Pacific West Natural Cod Fingers are made from natural Cod Fish, coated with breadcrumb to give you that satisfying cruch and taste
It is an ideal choice for those who seeks alternative to poultry
Pacific West Natural Cod Fingers are easy to cook
Simply deep fry in pre-heated oil straight from the freezer

metaData.Ingredients: Cod Fish, Wheat Flour, Water, Palm Oil, Modified Corn Starch (E1404), Modified Tapioca Starch (E1420), Sugar, Salt, Raising Agents (E450, E500), Soy Flour, Squid Extract Powder, Garlic, Flavour Enhancer (E621), Celery, Colours (E160C, E150D)
metaData.Key Information:
Natural Cod Fish, coated with Breadcrumbs
Easy to cook, direct from freezer to fryer
metaData.Nutritional Data:
Attributes Per Serving (90g)
Energy 199kcal
Trans Fat 0g
Protein 11.2g
Total Fat 9.8g
Saturated Fat 4.5g
Monounsaturated Fat 4.1g
Polyunsaturated Fat 1.2g
Carbohydrate 16.4g
Sugars 0.9g
Sodium 254mg
metaData.Preparation:
Deep fry:
1. Preheat oil to 180°C
2. Deep fry frozen Fish for 3 - 4 minutes or until golden brown
Conventional oven:
1. Preheat oven to 220°C
2. Place frozen Fish on a baking rack and bake for 12 - 14 minutes, turning fish after 7 minutes
Grill:
1. Grill frozen Fish on medium heat for 7 - 9 minutes or until golden brown
2. Turn occasionally
metaData.SAP Product Name: PACIFIC WEST NATURAL COD FINGERS (10 PCS) 300G
metaData.Storage Information:
Keep frozen
Store at or below -18°C
Do not refreeze once thawed
